prd.oneLiner: Connect purchase requests, budget checks, quote comparison, approval, purchase orders, and spend analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce purchase-request approval lead time by 30% and reduce off-contract purchasing.
prd.whyNow: Purchase requests, quotes, budget approvals, and purchase orders are separated, making spend control and vendor comparison difficult.
prd.problem: Purchase requests, quotes, budget approvals, and purchase orders are separated, making spend control and vendor comparison difficult.
prd.solution: Connect purchase requests, budget checks, quote comparison, approval, purchase orders, and spend analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee requesting a purchase
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Purchase requests, quotes, budget approvals, and purchase orders are separated, making spend control and vendor comparison difficult.

targets.name: Procurement and finance operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Purchase requests, quotes, budget approvals, and purchase orders are separated, making spend control and vendor comparison difficult.

scenarios.text: Employee requesting a purchase completes purchase request and quotation submission and checks progress.
Procurement and finance operations coordinator reviews procurement spend and lead-time reporting by category and department.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce purchase-request approval lead time by 30% and reduce off-contract purchasing.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Request, budget, and purchase-order status lookup
Budget validation, approval, vendor selection, and purchase-order handling
Procurement spend and lead-time reporting by category and department
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
